name: trafico-live-alexa-skill
description: Alexa Skill Lambda handler for trafico.live — trains, traffic, fuel

scripts.package: npm run clean && npm run build && cd dist && zip -r ../skill.zip . && cd ..
scripts.deploy: npm run package && aws lambda update-function-code --function-name trafico-live-alexa-skill --zip-file fileb://skill.zip
